description: Implement shared widgets/components, the custom notification system, and the authentication feature with login/register/forgot-password screens using Firebase Auth + Supabase user storage
steps: Create lib/shared/widgets/app_button.dart - premium button widget with loading state, haptic feedback, gradient variants
Create lib/shared/widgets/app_text_field.dart - custom text input with validation, animated labels, error states
Create lib/shared/widgets/app_card.dart - premium card with elevation, shadows matching design system
Create lib/shared/widgets/shimmer_loading.dart - skeleton loading widget for lists, cards, profiles
Create lib/shared/widgets/empty_state.dart - empty state widget with illustration, message, retry action
Create lib/shared/widgets/cached_image.dart - network image with placeholder, error state, caching
Create lib/shared/widgets/bottom_nav_bar.dart - floating bottom navigation with animated icons, 5 tabs (Home, Matches, My Games, Wallet, More)

Create lib/shared/components/top_notification.dart - custom notification overlay system: top safe area, animated entry/exit, blur background, swipe dismiss, success/error/info/warning states, iOS-style appearance
Create lib/shared/components/notification_controller.dart - Riverpod provider to trigger notifications app-wide
Create lib/features/auth/data/models/user_model.dart - Freezed model matching users table schema
Create lib/features/auth/data/repositories/auth_repository.dart - Firebase Auth + Supabase user upsert, login, register, forgot password, logout, check auth state
Create lib/features/auth/domain/providers/auth_provider.dart - Riverpod providers for auth state, current user, isAuthenticated, isAdmin
Create lib/features/auth/presentation/screens/splash_screen.dart - animated brand intro with logo animation, auto-redirect to home or login
Create lib/features/auth/presentation/screens/login_screen.dart - premium login UI with email/password, Google sign-in, GitHub sign-in, animated transitions
Create lib/features/auth/presentation/screens/register_screen.dart - registration with email, password, username, phone validation
Create lib/features/auth/presentation/widgets/auth_header.dart - branded header for auth screens
Update lib/core/router/app_router.dart with auth guards - redirect to login if not authenticated, redirect to home if already authenticated
acceptance_criteria: Custom top notification system with animated entry/exit, blur background, swipe dismiss
Notification supports success, error, info, warning states
Login screen with email/password and social auth buttons
Forgot password screen with email input
Splash screen with animated brand intro
Auth repository connects to Firebase Auth and Supabase users table
Riverpod auth state provider tracks login/logout/loading
Router guards redirect unauthenticated users to login
Bottom navigation bar with floating design and animated icons
verification: Verify lib/shared/components/top_notification.dart has animated entry, blur background, swipe dismiss
Verify lib/features/auth/data/repositories/auth_repository.dart has login, register, forgotPassword, logout methods using Firebase Auth
Verify lib/features/auth/presentation/screens/login_screen.dart renders email/password fields and social login buttons
Verify lib/core/router/app_router.dart has redirect logic for auth guard
findings: All 19 steps completed. UserModel uses manual fromJson/toJson/copyWith instead of Freezed code generation (build_runner cannot run in this environment). AuthRepository uses hide User on supabase_flutter import to avoid conflict with firebase_auth User class. The router now watches authProvider state for redirect logic. FloatingBottomNavBar replaces the old BottomNavigationBar in MainScaffold with a floating container using AnimatedSwitcher for icon transitions. TopNotificationOverlay uses OverlayEntry pattern with BackdropFilter for blur and GestureDetector with onVerticalDragUpdate/End for swipe-to-dismiss.
